message:
refactor(security,runtime): restructure isolation mesh, n-version oracle, lineage tracking, and optimization governor

Isolation Rail Router (isolation_rail_router.rs, ~1565 lines):
- Redesign rail ordering from Shared→Sandboxed→HardenedSandbox→Microvm to
  Standard→Elevated→HighAssurance→Critical for clearer security semantics
- Replace invariant names: INV_ISO_NO_UNCLASSIFIED → INV_POLICY_CONTINUITY,
  INV_ISO_MONOTONIC_ELEVATION → INV_HOT_ELEVATION, adding INV_BUDGET_BOUND
  and INV_FAIL_SAFE for comprehensive policy enforcement
- Migrate from BTreeSet/BTreeMap to HashMap for isolation mesh state (bd-gad3)

N-Version Oracle (nversion_oracle.rs, ~2038 lines):
- Comprehensive documentation reorganization with restructured invariants,
  event codes, and error code sections for improved readability
- Refactor RiskTier display from fmt::Display to dedicated label() method
- Improved structural organization for maintainability (bd-al8i)

Lineage Tracker (lineage_tracker.rs, +401 lines):
- Add canonical event codes (LINEAGE_TAG_ATTACHED, LINEAGE_FLOW_TRACKED,
  SENTINEL_*) and error codes (ERR_LINEAGE_TAG_MISSING, ERR_SENTINEL_*)
  for bd-2iyk acceptance criteria
- New types: SentinelScanResult, SentinelMetrics, CovertChannelDetection
  for exfiltration sentinel integration

Runtime Optimization Governor (runtime/optimization_governor.rs, +119 lines):
- New runtime knobs: ConcurrencyLimit, BatchSize, CacheCapacity,
  DrainTimeoutMs, RetryBudget with shadow evaluation before applying
- Event codes GOV_001-GOV_007 and safety envelope invariants

Also registers new subsystem modules (extensions, perf, registry, replay, sdk)
in main.rs and enhances staking governance controls (+43 lines).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+                    scope: "system".to_string(),
+                    deny: true,

+                    scope: "network".to_string(),
+                    deny: true,

+                    deny: true,
